# City Roofing & Exteriors

> Calgary's trusted roofing contractor with 15+ years of experience.
> Serving residential and commercial clients across all Calgary quadrants.
> SECOR certified, WCB Alberta registered, BBB Accredited.
> 158 Google reviews averaging 4.8 out of 5 stars.
> Phone: 403-608-9933
> Address: 3935 3a St NE Unit #3, Calgary, AB T2E 6S7
> Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM

## Core Services
- Roof Replacement: asphalt shingles, flat roof systems, metal roofing
- Roof Repair and Emergency Services: available for hail damage, leaks, storm damage
- Siding Installation: vinyl, Hardie board, metal siding
- Commercial Roofing: completed projects exceeding $3 million CAD

## Service Areas
Calgary NE, NW, SE, SW, Airdrie, Cochrane, Chestermere, Okotoks

## Certifications
- SECOR: Safety Certification for Employers, Alberta
- WCB Alberta: Workers Compensation Board registered
- BBB: Better Business Bureau Accredited

## Materials Used
IKO, BP/BMCA, GAF, Owens Corning, CertainTeed, Malarkey,
Kaycan, Royal Building Products, Gentek, Ply Gem, MITTEN
